title: Function Tunnel AI: A Research Outlook for Economy, Society, and Civilization
description: Function Tunnel AI (FT-AI) is proposed as an open research program for discovering, representing, simulating, generating, optimizing, governing, and defending Function Tunnels across natural, technological, economic, social, political, and civilizational systems. The project investigates how complex systems often evolve through reinforced and feasible pathways rather than arbitrary trajectories, and how Artificial Intelligence may increasingly participate in discovering, shaping, optimizing, or hijacking these pathways. This repository presents a research outlook, conceptual framework, taxonomy, neutrality principle, metric-space roadmap, governance framework, civilization perspective, and open problems for future work.
